title: Salmah #8009
definition:
Salmon = "garment"

 1) father of Boaz, father-in-law of Ruth, and grandfather of David
    1a) also 'Salmah', 'Salma'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Salmon = "garment"

 1) father of Boaz, father-in-law of Ruth, and grandfather of David
    1a) also 'Salmah', 'Salma'

    NASB:  father of Boaz, same as 8012
